lines.hearsay: {place} was short of a good deal, and somebody had already gone for it.
lines.gossip: {A} took {B}'s shortages off the counter at {place} without being asked and had the lot of it in the cart by dusk — {A} does this for {B} about once a week and calls it passing by, and {B} has never once called it anything at all.
lines.report: {A} undertook a fetch-run against {B}'s standing shortages at {place}, slot {slot}.
